kernel_build.observation: Kernel compilation successful for gfx906 target

test.observation: Numerical correctness test failed with NaN values in RMSNorm output. GEMV component passes (max_abs_error=0) but RMSNorm phase produces NaN results. Expected sum_sq=8855.26, got NaN. Output range: [nan, nan]

p2p_verification.observation: P2P access matrix passes (all 4 GPUs can access peers). P2P bandwidth 2.89 GB/s. Multi-GPU kernel launch passes. Peer buffer content validation passes. VAL-M1-007 satisfied.

typecheck.observation: No Python typecheck configured in project

lint.observation: No Python lint configured in project

reviewsSummary.note: Reviews not spawned due to validator failure

blockingIssues.description: Numerical correctness test fails with NaN values. The fused kernel RMSNorm phase produces NaN output. Test shows: GEMV max_abs_error=0 (pass), sum_sq values computed by WGs vary (GPU 0 mean=8280, GPU 3 mean=8855), but final output is NaN. Expected sum_sq=8855.26 from reference, got NaN. This indicates a bug in the cross-WG coordination or RMSNorm computation in gemv_int4_p2p_allreduce_rmsnorm.hip.
blockingIssues.evidence: test_fused_gemv_isolate.py output: 'Fused kernel output range: [nan, nan]', 'Max abs error: nan', 'VAL-GEMV-ISO-001 FAIL: max_abs_error=nan >= 5e-3'

blockingIssues.description: Cross-WG RMSNorm coordination incomplete. While WG sum_sq values are computed (varying from 8280 to 8855 across GPUs), the final rms_inv broadcast appears to produce NaN. The atomic counter mechanism works (WG 3 shows consistent sum_sq=8855), but the RMSNorm result propagation fails.
blockingIssues.evidence: GPU 3 WG sum_sq mean=8855.2646, std=0.0010 (correct and consistent). Other GPUs show varying values. Output is still NaN.

partialPasses.description: P2P access verification passes. All 4 GPUs can access peer memory via BAR1. Bandwidth 2.89 GB/s (expected for 2-hop PCIe). Multi-GPU kernel launch succeeds without errors. Peer buffer content validation passes with max_error=0.
